zh.Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Sc: 蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix Stewart於1197年出生在蘇格蘭時，她的父親Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland28歲，母親Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus23歲。她於大約1242年與Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1267年享年70歲。

zh-hans.Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Sc: 苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix Stewart于1197年出生在苏格兰时，她的父亲Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland28岁，母亲Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus23岁。她于大约1242年与Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1267年享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix Stewart was born in 1197, in Scotland, her father, Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland, was 28 and her mother, Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, was 23. She married Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles about 1242, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1267, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix Stewart est née en 1197, à Écosse, son père, Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles environ 1242, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1267, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix Stewart 1197 in Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland 28 und ihre Mutter Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus 23. Sie hat um 1242 in Argyll, Scotland Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1267 im Alter von 70 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix Stewart è nata il nel 1197 nel Scotland, sua padre, Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles circa 1242, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1267, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix Stewartが1197年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotlandは28歳，母Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angusは23歳であった。約1242年にスコットランドアルグイルでDonald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Islesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1267年に70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix Stewart(이)가 1197년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1242년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1267년 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix Stewart nasceu em 1197, em Scotland, seu pai, Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles aproximadamente 1242, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1267, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix Stewart родилась в 1197 г. в местности Шотландия, её отцу по имени Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles около 1242 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1267 г. в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrix Stewart nació en 1197, en Scotland, su papá, Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles aproximadamente 1242, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1267, a la edad de 70 años.
